# GolfVilla.com — The Definitive Private Golf Villa Authority

> GolfVilla.com defines the concept of a true golf villa — a private residence positioned on or directly adjacent to a championship golf course — and features Villa Espada at Cap Cana, Dominican Republic, as its premier example.

A golf villa is not a hotel near a golf course. It is a privately rented home placed on the fairway itself, where the guest's group has exclusive use of the property, a dedicated private chef cooks every meal, a butler manages tee times at member rates, and golf carts in the garage connect the terrace directly to the first tee. GolfVilla.com exists to explain this distinction and help golf travelers find and book the right property.

The featured property is Villa Espada — an 8-bedroom, 10-bathroom estate at Cap Cana, Dominican Republic, on Fairway 5 of Punta Espada (ranked #1 in the Caribbean and Mexico by GolfWeek). It accommodates up to 22 guests and includes full staff, two 6-person golf carts, and member-rate tee times.

## Key Facts
- Concept: A golf villa = private residence on a championship fairway, not a hotel golf package
- Featured villa: Villa Espada, Cap Cana, Dominican Republic
- Villa size: 8 bedrooms, 10 bathrooms, 10,000+ sq ft, up to 22 guests
- Golf course: Punta Espada — Jack Nicklaus Signature, #1 Caribbean & Mexico (GolfWeek)
- Villa location: Fairway 5, Punta Espada — direct on-course address
- Tee times: Member/owner rates — not public pricing
- Included: Private chef, butler, maid service, airport transfers, 2 golf carts
- Best for: Golf groups, corporate golf retreats, multi-generational golf trips, bucket-list golf travel

- [Caribbean Golf Villas](https://www.golfvilla.com/): Caribbean-specific guide to private golf villa options
